headline: Disney's 'Jungle Cruise' Tops Weekend US Box Office At $34.1 Million
summary: The Walt Disney Company’s (NYSE: DIS) “Jungle Cruise” reigned at the weekend U.S. box office with $34.1 million in ticket sales from a 4,310-screen engagement.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: American Express, GE, GlaxoSmithKline, Intel And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's offers investors an overlooked way to play the coming infrastructure surge.
	Other featured articles discuss how to find rising dividends, why some electric vehicle start-ups are in trouble and whether the shine is off big tech stocks after earnings.

headline: Zoom Reaches $85M Settlement In Lawsuit Over User Privacy
summary: Zoom Video Communications Inc (NASDAQ: ZM) has agreed to pay $85 million to settle a lawsuit claiming it violated users' privacy rights, Reuters

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Amazon, Apple, GE, Netflix, Tesla, Visa And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the last week. 
	Last week's bullish calls included two FAANG stocks, a Bitcoin play and an industrial giant.

headline: Carter Worth And Mike Khouw's Amgen Trade
summary: Carter Worth and Mike Khouw teamed up on CNBC's "Options Action" to give the viewers a bearish trade in Amgen, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMGN) ahead of earnings.<
